---
output: 
  html_document:
    include:
      after_body: footer.html
---    

## Pre-order boards {#preorder}

**Be one of the first to skate our boards!**

<centre> We are currently in the final stages of the first graphic run. If you have a preference on board graphic contact me on *0481 316 760* :)</centre>

```{r, echo=FALSE,out.width="10%", out.height="10%",fig.cap="caption",fig.show='hold',fig.align='center'}
knitr::include_graphics(c("assets/imgs/nip8.5_v1.png", "assets/imgs/niptape2.png", "assets/imgs/nip8.5_v3.png", "assets/imgs/nip8.5_v2.png", "assets/imgs/niptape3.png"))
``` 

<form action="https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr" method="post" target="_top">
<input type="hidden" name="cmd" value="_s-xclick">
<table>
<tr><td><input type="hidden" name="on0" value="Deposit amount">Deposit amount</td></tr><tr><td><select name="os0">
	<option value="Option 1">Option 1 $29.99 AUD</option>
	<option value="Option 2">Option 2 $44.99 AUD</option>
	<option value="Option 3">Option 3 $89.99 AUD</option>
</select> </td></tr>
</table>
<input type="hidden" name="currency_code" value="AUD">
<input type="hidden" name="encrypted" value="-----BEGIN PKCS7----------END PKCS7-----">
<input type="image" src="https://www.paypalobjects.com/en_AU/i/btn/btn_paynowCC_LG.gif" border="0" name="submit" alt="PayPal – The safer, easier way to pay online!">
<img alt="" border="0" src="https://www.paypalobjects.com/en_AU/i/scr/pixel.gif" width="1" height="1">
</form>
